focus: Q1 bugs/drift/weak prose beyond known 3 INSTALL_GUIDE drifts

description: Database path states .opencode/.spec-kit/code-graph/database/code-graph.sqlite but database-path-policy.md:31 states .opencode/skills/system-code-graph/mcp_server/database/code-graph.sqlite. Policy vs runtime inconsistency.

Policy states package-local path at .opencode/skills/system-code-graph/mcp_server/database/code-graph.sqlite but INSTALL_GUIDE.md:43 describes standalone shared location at .opencode/.spec-kit/code-graph/database/. ADR-002 constraint vs post-migration runtime conflict.

Database migration description is passive and vague: 'auto-migrated to the standalone shared location on next launch.' Unclear whether this is copy vs move, what happens to old file, whether user action required.
